title: MaceCore!
description: MaceCore is a plugin that allows to modify the mace changing its cooldown limiting it changing its recipe limiting its damage or even limiting how many times it can be crafted.
body:
**MaceCore** is a powerful combat-focused plugin that enhances the mace with advanced mechanics, full customization, and clean gameplay integration.

- ⚔️ Custom mace cooldown with true vanilla cooldown bar
- 💥 Configurable damage limiter (accurate final damage control)
- 🚫 Toggle maces on/off with automatic lore + instant sync
- ⚡ Dash ability with particles, sound, and action bar cooldown
- 🧪 Fully customizable crafting recipe with in-game GUI editor
- 🔒 Persistent global craft limiter
- 🎯 Clean, optimized, and SMP-ready design

Built for performance, balance, and competitive gameplay.


![Recipe editor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/813babb2acaccda4c74d2357aed0e02df921f517.png)

![Config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba1d00f4c2017db6bf26ce7a3067f78d6d6df67b.png)
